Hexagonal coordinate system for EC4X game maps

This module provides a hexagonal coordinate system using axial coordinates (q, r). The hex grid is used to represent star systems in the game world.

Types

Hex = object
  q*: int32                  ## Axial coordinate q
  r*: int32                  ## Axial coordinate r

Consts

HexOrigin = (q: 0, r: 0)

Procs

proc `$`(h: Hex): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
String representation of hex coordinate 
proc `==`(a, b: Hex): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Equality comparison for hex coordinates 
proc distance(h1, h2: Hex): uint32 {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate the distance between two hex coordinates 
proc hash(h: Hex): Hash {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Hash function for hex coordinates 
proc hex(q, r: int): Hex {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

proc neighbor(h: Hex; direction: int): Hex {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get the neighbor hex in the specified direction (0-5) Directions: 0=East, 1=Northeast, 2=Northwest, 3=West, 4=Southwest, 5=Southeast 
proc neighbors(h: Hex): seq[Hex] {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get all 6 neighbors of a hex coordinate 
proc newHex(q, r: int32): Hex {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a new hexagonal coordinate 
proc toId(h: Hex; numRings: uint32): uint {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Convert hex coordinates to a unique ID based on the number of rings 
proc withinRadius(center: Hex; radius: int32): seq[Hex] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get all hex coordinates within a given radius from center
